name: SBB
description: Search train connections, departures, and stations across Switzerland (SBB/CFF/FFS, via transport.opendata.ch, free)

tools.name: search_station
tools.description: Search for a train station by name

tools.name: get_departures
tools.description: Get upcoming departures from a station

tools.name: get_arrivals
tools.description: Get upcoming arrivals at a station

tools.name: search_journey
tools.description: Search for train connections between two stations

author: freddy-schuetz
